cn.trackName: 打造世界-经典沙盒建造
cn.description:
《打造世界》结合了策略、方块建造沙盒以及塔防多种元素。游戏中，你不是一个人在战斗，需要带领矮人部落在这个充满危险生物的随机世界里进行探索，安排他们分工合作收集资源，制作需要的物品、武器和盔甲，以及建造城堡，来抵御危险生物的入侵。

【世界探索、沙盒生存】
游戏共有八个不同的世界（游戏本体4个地图+4个dlc地图），每个世界都是随机生成的岛屿，你可以在游戏中自由的改变地形地貌。不同世界有着各自的地理及生物特色，同时也暗藏各类怪物和BOSS。带上大聪明矮人征服各个世界吧！

【资源采集、制作发展】
游戏中挖掘矿藏、捕捉动物、打败敌人、种植农田等等方式获得原料；升级科技树，制作数百种完全不同的物品！要知道除了常规的武器、建筑材料、食物、炼金药水外，你甚至建造一个广大的矿井网，配上升降机和铁路，快速抵达藏有最珍贵金属的矿脉中。如何发展矮人部落，你可要好好思考一下。
对了，必须得告诉你，游戏中存在各种魔法，比如打开传送门，提高矮人运输资源的效率；使用魔法之光照亮黑暗的洞穴吓跑怪物；使用降水或是魔法森林加快树木成长，或者是使用指南针魔法找到隐藏资源，从而帮助加快资源开采，探索世界。

【自由建造、殖民管理】
发展一个部落可没那么容易，你需要安排矮人们的衣食住行，可以直接控制矮人进行挖掘、砍伐、攻击、建造等操作，并在矮人与怪物和BOSS战斗时使用魔法帮助他们。
在游戏刚开始时，你只有1位矮人，随着在这个世界的等级提升，会获得更多的矮人；而随着人数越来越多，部落规模也越来越大的。
部落的发展，建筑是必不可少的，发挥你天马星空的想象吧，无论是建古代宫殿风格、还是想要征服天空的空中住宅、又或者是结合现代科技坚不可摧的堡垒，只要你脑洞够大，创造独属于你的矮人之家！

【即时战略&塔防战斗】
有些怪物会成群结队的来掠夺矮人资源，有些怪物会定期从传送门而来攻打矮人，你需要带领矮人建立攻防系统，在的堡垒周围的路上设满陷阱和导弹塔，抵抗成群结队入侵而来的敌人。

【DLC拓展内容】
丰富的DLC内容拓展既可以带你领略不一样的世界：奇幻森林大冒险《奇境森林》、融合中式风格元素的《龙之神庙》、家园领地保卫战的《孤山世界》、暗黑领主和矮人的终极决战《邪恶之心》，还可以让你在世界探索中增加更多乐趣：女矮人携宠物及新装备登场的《姐妹连》、在神秘的斯芬克斯的沙漠世界探索神庙的《废弃矿山》、充满了植物和古老的魔法的《贪婪洞窟》，召唤英雄战士和法师的《英雄对决》，对抗更加强大的地下深渊头目的《怪物联盟》。以及更多DLC持续推出中。

每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

hk.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

hk.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

hk.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened

hk.description:
每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】
划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译；
播放调节：8档语速调节、4种译文切换，满足不同阶段的学习需求；
智能提示：重点单词、各大考试（四六级、考研、托福GRE雅思等）的高频词，可在文章中自动标注，单词学习更高效；
生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；
阅读提醒：同学，今天是不是忘记阅读了？不要紧，软件每天都可以按时提醒你。

【文件阅读，即点即查】 
您可以导入需要阅读的文献，支持PDF、ePub、Docx等多种格式
阅读时即点即查，省却查词时复制粘贴的烦恼，阅读效率大大提高
支持重点内容高亮，添加批注，随时记录你阅读时的所思所想

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

● 地城+解謎+倉庫番

mo.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

mo.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

mo.trackCensoredName: Road to Empress - 盛世天下 媚娘篇
mo.releaseNotes: 《隱形守護者》團隊New One Studio全新力作
mo.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial
TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

mo.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

mo.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

【本次更新】

- 新增 Epub支持阅读时长统计功能
- 新增 词汇提示支持筛选生词本分组
mo.description:
每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】
划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译；
播放调节：8档语速调节、4种译文切换，满足不同阶段的学习需求；
智能提示：重点单词、各大考试（四六级、考研、托福GRE雅思等）的高频词，可在文章中自动标注，单词学习更高效；
生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；
阅读提醒：同学，今天是不是忘记阅读了？不要紧，软件每天都可以按时提醒你。

【文件阅读，即点即查】 
您可以导入需要阅读的文献，支持PDF、ePub、Docx等多种格式
阅读时即点即查，省却查词时复制粘贴的烦恼，阅读效率大大提高
支持重点内容高亮，添加批注，随时记录你阅读时的所思所想

【订阅服务说明】
订阅服务：每日外刊包月（1个月）、VIP 连续包季（3个月）
订阅价格：以iAP申请信息为准，例如每日外刊服务为63元/月；VIP 包季服务为58元/季度
付款：用户确认购买并付款后计入iTunes账户
苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期
如需取消订阅，请手动打开苹果手机“设置”->进入“iTunes Store与App Store”->点击“Apple ID”，选择“查看Apple ID”，进入“账户设置”页面，点击“订阅”，取消订阅即可。如未在订阅期结束的至少24小时前关闭订阅，此订阅将自动续订。
自动续费规则：https://www.eudic.net/v4/en/home/service
隐私协议：https://www.eudic.net/v4/home/privacy

tw.description:
--

獲獎：
● 日本 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT | 官方入選
● 韓國 2020 釜山獨立遊戲節 (BIC Fest) | 最佳休閒獎
● 台灣 2020 巴哈姆特 ACG 創作大賽 | 銅賞

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

遊戲特色：
● 地城+解謎+倉庫番
● 150 個精心設計的關卡
● 地城氛圍的像素美術
● 非線性地城地圖

tw.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

tw.description:
延續「1941 Frozen Front」的戰鬥，惟這一次，打的是海戰。加入海軍，打贏生死存亡之戰！稱雄戰場，派遣戰士奔赴前線。最真實的軍事作戰！
選擇正確戰術，運用突擊隊，擊潰頑敵！既可以在戰役中指揮美軍，也可以在戰鬥中統領日軍。步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種協同作戰，消滅敵軍幫兇；PACIFIC FRONT，以靈活的指揮技巧獲得晉升！

*** 任務簡報 ***

魚雷、炸彈，強大武器上陣作戰！
坦克、步兵，攻克敵人陣地！
轟炸機群，搗毀敵軍指揮部！
潛艇偷襲，令敵軍防不勝防！
在惡劣地形中佈置你的炮兵部隊！
清除灘頭、湖泊、海峽的各種障礙！
伏擊敵人！ 
為部隊提供物資和彈藥！
護衛航母及戰艦群！

特色：
- 去除廣告！
- 以二戰為背景的回合制戰略行動遊戲
- 激動人心的戰役和充滿挑戰的任務
- 符合史實的美、日軍隊建制
- 美日雙方步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種一應俱全
- 戰鬥中可修理，偽裝，構築各種人員和建物
-白熱化的多人戰鬥
- 六角網格可一覽無餘
- 細膩的圖片和極為真實的聲效
- 高難的搖滾配樂

感謝您選擇 '1942 Pacific Front'！

© HandyGames 2026

tw.trackName: 女王的遊戲：盛世天下 媚娘篇
tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61579257674931
YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial
TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

※本遊戲為付費遊戲，且遊戲內亦另提供購買虛擬遊戲幣、物品等付費服務，請依個人興趣及能力進行適度消費。
※請注意遊戲時間，避免沉迷，長時間進行遊戲，容易影響作息，宜適度休息及運動。
※本遊戲由艾瑞爾網路股份有限公司代理，如有疑問，請以本遊戲客服管道聯繫。

This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile

• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

tw.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

tw.description:
每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】
划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译；
播放调节：8档语速调节、4种译文切换，满足不同阶段的学习需求；
智能提示：重点单词、各大考试（四六级、考研、托福GRE雅思等）的高频词，可在文章中自动标注，单词学习更高效；
生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；
阅读提醒：同学，今天是不是忘记阅读了？不要紧，软件每天都可以按时提醒你。

【文件阅读，即点即查】 
您可以导入需要阅读的文献，支持PDF、ePub、Docx等多种格式
阅读时即点即查，省却查词时复制粘贴的烦恼，阅读效率大大提高
支持重点内容高亮，添加批注，随时记录你阅读时的所思所想

【订阅服务说明】
订阅服务：每日外刊包月（1个月）、VIP 连续包季（3个月）
订阅价格：以iAP申请信息为准，例如每日外刊服务为63元/月；VIP 包季服务为58元/季度

us.description:
Survive in endless dungeons by connecting blocks to attack, defend, and heal. Dungeon Tracer is a roguelike puzzle RPG that combines strategic turn-based combat with dungeon exploration. Connect identical blocks to unleash powerful sword attacks, shield defenses, and life-saving potions. Your decisions each turn shape the outcome of battles and your survival.

■ Recommended for
- Players who enjoy puzzle RPGs and roguelikes
- Fans of turn-based strategy combat
- Those seeking offline dungeon adventures
- Gamers who love crafting new builds and strategies through replay

■ Core Gameplay
- Connect blocks to attack, defend, and heal
- Every turn's choice impacts your strategy
- Combo effects grow stronger with longer connections
- Embrace the roguelike challenge where death means starting anew
- Develop survival strategies in ever-changing scenarios

■ In-Depth Strategic Combat
Experience the blend of intuitive block connection puzzles and the tactical depth of roguelike RPGs. Your play style varies with block placements, enemy types, skill selections, and item combinations.

■ 10 Classes and 10 Races
Each class features unique skills and traits. Combine these with racial traits for diverse builds. Experiment to find your ideal strategy.

■ Diverse Skills and Builds
Mix over 40 active skills and growth elements to create your unique combat style. Each skill and item choice leads to different outcomes.

■ Special Monsters and Block Debuffs
Face 43 unique monsters, including liches, avengers, kamikazes, and assassins. Block debuffs like freeze, fire, poison, and lock can turn the tide of battle. Simply connecting blocks won't guarantee victory.

■ Fair Roguelike Challenge
A seed-based deterministic random system ensures consistent results in each run. Enjoy a challenge where strategy and judgment outweigh luck.

■ More Fun with Repeated Growth
Skill choices evolve with each level-up
Builds focus on upgrades and items
Dungeons reconfigure with each playthrough
A structure where a single mistake heightens the tension

■ Global Leaderboard
Compete with players worldwide. Test your skills against global rankings and showcase your best scores.

■ 4 Difficulty Levels
Choose from Easy, Normal, Hard, and Very Hard
Enjoyable challenges for both newcomers and veterans.

■ Premium Offline RPG
- No ads
- No in-app purchases
- Enjoy offline play

Once purchased, access all content fully.

■ Support for Multiple Languages and Cloud Save
Supports 22 languages, ensuring you can continue your adventure seamlessly across devices.

Endless dungeons await, filled with powerful monsters and strategic choices. How long can you survive? Experience the depth of puzzle roguelike RPGs in Dungeon Tracer today!

us.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

us.description:
Window seat or aisle? Booth or table? Lone wolf or life of the party? In Is This Seat Taken?, your mission is to organize groups of people according to their preferences. It’s a cozy, no-pressure logic puzzle game where you’re in charge of who sits where.

Whether it’s the cinema, a crowded bus, a wedding reception, or a cramped taxi cab, every setting introduces new characters with specific tastes. A party guest with a sensitive nose won’t be happy sitting next to a stranger who’s wearing too much cologne. A sleepy passenger won’t be happy trying to nap on the bus next to someone listening to loud music. It’s all about reading the room to find the perfect placement!

Nat is an aspiring actor whose world gets turned upside down when they see a shape just like them on the big screen. This discovery sends Nat on a global journey to meet their hero and figure out how to fit in. Experience Nat's heartfelt story as you travel from city to city, each with its own levels, characters, and charm.

- Play seating matchmaker to please picky characters.
- Discover each character’s unique traits—relatable, outlandish, and everything in between.
- Piece together satisfying puzzles with no timers or leaderboards.
- Unlock fun new scenarios as you progress—from bus rides to banquets!

每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

tr.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

轻历是一款纯净无广告的高颜值日历。您可以使用“轻历”来创建和管理你的日程、计划和生日。也可以快速了解关于时间和日历的所有信息。更有自定义角标、个性化设置主题色等功能，让您自由装饰属于自己的日历。iCloud还会自动同步您的日程和自定义标签。让您记录下的信息永远不会丢失。

功能

· 包含最全的农历、黄历、节日、节气、法定节假日等。时间信息、每日宜忌等一目了然。更全面的黄历信息一触即达

· 点击首页的 “+”来创建一个计划、日程、生日或倒数日。还可设置提醒时间，让重要的事永远不会错过

· 轻历还可以同步系统日历。

首页右滑可以进入更多功能页面。

· 日期计算小工具 - 帮你快速得到想要的信息。

· 自定义角标功能 - 可以让您给任意日期加上标签，您可以用来标注自己的假期和工作日，也可以用来标注任何重要的日子。

· 个性化设置 - 定制日历的主题色，字体。让它更符合自己的审美

· 联系我

  告诉我你遇到的问题、你的建议、你想要的功能

  邮箱：wdcalendar@126.com
  微博：轻历

tr.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

Differences from the free version:
- exclusive rain notification
- no Ads

Expect the Unexpected with this Beautiful and Easy-to-use Weather App

Accurate Minute to Minute Rainfall Forecast - When will the rain start and when is it going to stop? Know about the weather in advance and plan your day out properly!


Street-level accuracy: No more imprecise forecasts based on a national or city level! Your exclusive weather forecast for every block in the neighborhood is here!

Multiple Location Selections: Street-level accurate forecasts to keep an eye on your loved ones!


China Rainfall Map - We use the National Meteorological Radar to produce our accurate forecast. Just take a glimpse to know exactly where and how heavy the rain will be!


China Air Pollution Map - Is the pollution growing stronger or fading away? Where is it heading to? Just take a look at this map and get the answer to all of your questions!

Real-time satellite imagery
From the astronaut's point of view, tracing the flowing cloud and glittering days, and Help yourself judge the weather

Omni-directional weather map
Look at the evolution trend of precipitation, temperature, dew point temperature, humidity and visibility in the next two days.

Weather Feedback - If you feel that our forecast is not completely accurate, please tap the feedback button to help us improve!


------
A big thank you to the "Swarma Club" and our partners for their long-term and unfailing support!

tr.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

pt.description:
Northgard é um jogo de estratégia baseado na mitologia nórdica em que você controla um clã de vikings que lutam pelo controle de um misterioso continente recém-descoberto.

Após anos de explorações incansáveis, os bravos vikings descobriram uma nova terra cheia de mistérios, perigos e riquezas: NORTHGARD.

Os nórdicos mais ousados embarcaram para explorar e conquistar essas novas costas, trazer fama para seu clã e escrever a história por meio de conquistas, comércio ou devoção aos deuses.

Isto é, se eles conseguirem sobreviver aos terríveis lobos e guerreiros mortos-vivos que vagam pela terra, fazer amizade ou derrotar os gigantes e sobreviver aos invernos mais rigorosos já testemunhados no norte.

RECURSOS
• Monte seu povoado no continente recém-descoberto de Northgard
• Atribua vários empregos a seus vikings (fazendeiro, guerreiro, marinheiro, mestre historiador...)
• Gerencie os recursos com cuidado e sobreviva a invernos rigorosos e inimigos cruéis
• Expanda e descubra novos territórios com oportunidades estratégicas únicas
• Alcance condições de vitória diferentes (conquista, fama, conhecimento, negociação...)

MODO DE HISTÓRIA: SAGA DE RIG
O Alto Rei Viking é assassinado e seu chifre real é roubado por um homem chamado Hagen.
Este evento dá início a uma saga que levará Rig, seu filho e herdeiro, acompanhado pelo braço direito Brand através do novo continente de Northgard.
O continente onde ele fará novos amigos e inimigos e descobrirá uma ameaça muito maior do que Hagen, além das razões por trás do assassinato do pai.

MULTIJOGADOR
• Jogue com ou contra outros jogadores em dispositivos móveis. Até 6 jogadores
• Inclui os modos de duelo, por conta própria e em equipe

ESCOLHA O SEU CLÃ
Para concluir os 11 capítulos da campanha, o jogador terá que dominar as especificidades dos 6 primeiros clãs e domar a selvagem e implacável Northgard.

Mais clãs estão se juntando à luta por Northgard!
• Clã da Cobra: aja das sombras e assuma a liderança com táticas de guerrilha astutas
• Clã do Dragão: abrace os velhos costumes e agrade aos deuses com sacrifícios
• Clã do Kraken: aproveite a recompensa do mar e liberte seu poder brutal
Você pode desbloquear os clãs da Cobra, do Dragão e do Kraken separadamente comprando os DLCs ou juntos com o Pacote de Pele.

• Clã do Cavalo: dedique-se à arte de ferreiro e crie relíquias poderosas
• Clã do Boi: use equipamentos ancestrais e comprove o poder dos seus antepassados
• Clã do Lince: adote o caminho da natureza e atraia presas míticas em emboscadas
Você pode desbloquear os clãs do Cavalo, do Boi e do Lince separadamente comprando os DLCs, ou juntos com o Pacote de Pelo.

• Clã do Esquilo: junte ingredientes, prepare receitas especiais e sobreviva aos invernos rigorosos
• Clã do Rato: abrace o caminho dos xamãs e trabalhe para o clã
• Clã da Águia: ocupe um grande território, aventure-se por aí e junte recursos
Desbloqueie os clãs do Esquilo, do Rato e da Águia separadamente comprando os DLCs, ou juntos com o Pacote de Inverno.

Reprojetado cuidadosamente para dispositivos móveis
• Interface renovada
• Conquistas do Game Center
• iCloud - Compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS

Como você honrará seu clã?

Se você tiver qualquer problema com Northgard, entre em contato com nosso atendimento ao cliente em support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com e forneça o máximo de informações possível sobre o problema.

pt.releaseNotes:
1.24.4 - Bug fixes for Xenolith

Das profundezas infinitas do espaço surge um tipo de peste totalmente alienígena. Jogabilidade radicalmente nova, condições de vitória misteriosas, genes interestelares, música assombrosa e muito mais…

Xenoforme o planeta! Transforme um planeta inteiro em cristal
Evento de extinção: os humanos são totalmente insignificantes, mas ainda podem atrapalhar você se forem deixados em paz com satélites defensivos, semeadura de nuvens e mais. Use meteoros para destruí-los primeiro
pt.description:
Você consegue contaminar o mundo? Plague Inc. é uma mistura única de alta estratégia e simulação terrivelmente realista. 

Seu agente patogênico acabou de contaminar o 'Paciente zero'. Agora você deve acabar com a história da humanidade evoluindo para uma mortal Praga global, enquanto se adapta a tudo que a humanidade pode fazer para se defender. 

Brilhantemente executado, com jogabilidade inovadora e construido especificamente para iPhone e iPad, Plague Inc. é uma evolução do gênero de estratégia e leva os jogos em dispositivos móves (e você) a novos níveis. É Você contra o mundo - só o forte sobrevive! 

◈◈◈ Jogo #1 globalmente com mais de 500 milhões de jogos jogados ◈◈◈

Plague Inc. é um hit global com mais de meio milhão de classificações de 5 estrelas e reportagens em jornais como The Economist, New York Post, Boston Herald, The Guardian e London Metro! 

O desenvolvedor de Plague Inc. foi convidado a falar no CDC em Atlanta sobre os modelos de doenças do jogo!

▶ “O jogo cria um mundo convincente que engaja o público em tópicos sérios de saúde pública” – The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
▶ “Melhor jogo para tablet de 2012” - New York Daily News 
▶ “Plague Inc. vai captar sua atenção de todas as formas certas, e vai mantê-la” - Touch Arcade 
▶ “Não há como negar o alto nível de qualidade de Plague Inc.” - Modojo 
▶ “Plague Inc. não deveria ser tão divertido como é” – London Metro 
▶ “Vai deixar você na esperança de destruir o mundo, tudo em nome de um pouco de diversão” – Pocket Lint 
▶ “A jogabilidade de Plague Inc.'s é contagiosa” - Slide to Play 
▶ Vencedor – “Melhor jogo do ano” – Pocket Gamer
▶ “Matar bilhões nunca foi tão divertido” – IGN 

◈◈◈

Características: 
● Lindos gráficos retina com uma interface bastante refinada (Contágio garantido) 
● Mundo hiperrealistas, altamente detalhado, com IA avançada (Gerenciamento de epidemia) 
● Sistema abrangente de ajudar e tutorial (Eu sou a lenda da ajuda) 
● 12 diferentes tipos de doenças com estratégias radicalmente diferentes para dominar (12 Macacos?) 
● Funcionalidade completa de Salvamento/Carregamento (28 salvamentos depois!) 
● 50+ países para contaminar, centenas de caractetísticas para evoluir e milhares de eventos mundiais para se adaptar (Evolução pandêmica) 
● Suporte total ao jogo 
● Atualizações de expansão acrescentam o Verme Neurax que controla a mente, o Vírus Necroa que produz zumbis, Corridas de velocidade e Cenários da vida real!
● Você consegue salvar o mundo? Assuma o controle e vença uma doença mundial na nossa maior expansão!
● Enfrente as Doenças Diárias, ganhe melhorias poderosas e compita contra o mundo no Modo Surto!


Traduzido para Inglês, Alemão, Espanhol, Português do Brasil, Italiano, Francês, Japonês, Coreano e Russo. (mais em breve) 

P.S. Dê um tapa nas suas costas se entendeu todos as referências da literatura do tema! 

Preço promocional especial para celebrar o fato de ser o 5º jogo de iPhone mais popular de 2015!

◈◈◈

Curta Plague Inc. no Facebook: 
http://www.facebook.com/PlagueInc 

Siga-me no Twitter: 
www.twitter.com/NdemicCreations

pt.description:
SEIZE FORBIDDEN TREASURES. SUMMON ALIEN GODS. FEED ON YOUR DISCIPLES.

BE WARNED. This game has no tutorial - part of the challenge is figuring out how to play. It's hard, but keep trying, and you'll master it. Good luck!

In this infamous roguelike narrative card game, play as a seeker after unholy mysteries in a 1920s-themed setting of hidden gods and secret histories. Become a scholar of the unseen arts. Craft tools and summon spirits. Indoctrinate innocents. Seize your place as the herald of a new age.

Cultist Simulator was first released on PC and has more than 200,000 players all over the world. Now we’re bringing the cosmic mysteries of Cultist Simulator to mobile.

• Challenging roguelike gameplay - There is never only one history.
Cultist Simulator doesn’t hold your hand. Experiment, expire and transcend death with a story-driven legacy system. Over time you’ll learn enough to wrestle the game to its knees.

• Intense, immersive narrative – Combine cards to tell your own story.
A hefty novel’s worth of choice-based storytelling, from the creator of Fallen London and Sunless Sea. There are many paths through this game of ambition, appetite and abomination, and many ways your tale can end.

• A rich Lovecraftian world – Corrupt your friends and consume your enemies.
Search your dreams for sanity-twisting rituals. Translate grimoires and glean their lore. Penetrate the realm of the Hours and win a place in their service. Cultist Simulator brings the peripheral horror of Lovecraft’s tales to an entirely new setting.

Expand your knowledge with the DLCs: New Legacies, New Ascensions, New Mechanics...
• The Dancer - Join the Bacchanal
• The Priest - Knock, and Ye Shall Be Opened
• The Ghoul - Taste of the graveyard's fruit
• The Exile - Some there are who will not yield

If you encounter any issue with the game, please click on “Contact us” at the bottom of this page and give us as many details as possible regarding the issue and your device: https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/11-cultist-simulator/?p=ios

pt.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

pt.description:
每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】
划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译；
播放调节：8档语速调节、4种译文切换，满足不同阶段的学习需求；
智能提示：重点单词、各大考试（四六级、考研、托福GRE雅思等）的高频词，可在文章中自动标注，单词学习更高效；
生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；
阅读提醒：同学，今天是不是忘记阅读了？不要紧，软件每天都可以按时提醒你。

【文件阅读，即点即查】 
您可以导入需要阅读的文献，支持PDF、ePub、Docx等多种格式
阅读时即点即查，省却查词时复制粘贴的烦恼，阅读效率大大提高
支持重点内容高亮，添加批注，随时记录你阅读时的所思所想

【订阅服务说明】
订阅服务：每日外刊包月（1个月）、VIP 连续包季（3个月）
订阅价格：以iAP申请信息为准，例如每日外刊服务为63元/月；VIP 包季服务为58元/季度
付款：用户确认购买并付款后计入iTunes账户
苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期
如需取消订阅，请手动打开苹果手机“设置”->进入“iTunes Store与App Store”->点击“Apple ID”，选择“查看Apple ID”，进入“账户设置”页面，点击“订阅”，取消订阅即可。如未在订阅期结束的至少24小时前关闭订阅，此订阅将自动续订。
